WORK • BUILDS • PROJECTS

NOT JUST A
PORTFOLIO
PAGE.

This is where the messy ideas, rough layouts, half-built screens, and “can it work like this?” moments turn into something clear, clickable, and ready to use.

Websites, app-style builds, dashboards, systems, and the pieces in between.

Start a Project
messy notes <app-flow /> dashboards website builds forms + buttons clean structure </system> messy notes <app-flow /> dashboards website builds forms + buttons clean structure </system>

FEATURED BUILDS

BUILDS THAT SHOW
THE RANGE.

A mix of completed projects, active builds, and process examples that show the kinds of websites, app-style systems, dashboards, and workflows I can create.

DEALS / AFFILIATE WEBSITE COMPLETED BUILD

Bright Eyed Deals

A bright, friendly deals-and-finds website built to showcase curated product picks, buying guides, and affiliate links in a clean, easy-to-browse layout.

Website design Pages + menu SEO setup Buying guides Mobile-friendly
VIEW LIVE SITE →
PHOTOGRAPHY WEBSITE COMPLETED BUILD

Anchored In Him Images

A faith-rooted photography website built to capture Amanda's voice, story, and community. Designed for families, seniors, weddings, rodeo, and events — with every detail reflecting who she is.

Website design Client voice Gallery layout Booking flow Faith-based brand Mobile-friendly
VIEW LIVE SITE →
SALON WEBSITE COMPLETED BUILD

AC Hair Co.

An elegant, editorial salon website built to introduce the stylist, lay out services, and make booking effortless — with a warm, welcoming feel.

Website design Service pages Booking flow Brand styling Mobile-friendly
VIEW LIVE SITE →
BRIDAL HAIR & MAKEUP WEBSITE COMPLETED BUILD

Always & Forever Beauty

A soft, timeless bridal hair and makeup website for Colleen Mulholland — built to share packages, gallery, and story, and to guide brides to inquire.

Website design Packages Gallery Inquiry flow Mobile-friendly
VIEW LIVE SITE →
BEAUTY / SALON WEBSITE COMPLETED BUILD

Schmitz Beauty Co.

A bold, thoughtful beauty website for Brenna at Simplicity Salon — built around a consultation-first flow, with services, about, and an easy way to book.

Website design Consultation flow Service menu Booking Mobile-friendly
VIEW LIVE SITE →
WEBSITE + SYSTEM BUILD ACTIVE BUILD

Pillager Youth Basketball

A website and digital hub built to help organize program information, board resources, parent updates, forms, and communication.

Website structure Page layouts Forms Board hub Parent communication flow Mobile-friendly sections
CONSTRUCTION WEBSITE COMPLETED BUILD

Blue Chip Splicing

A clean construction/service website built to explain the business, show what they do, build trust, and give people a clear way to reach out.

Service website Construction Business info Contact flow
WEBSITE BUILD COMPLETED BUILD

Maggie Dukek

A personal portfolio website built to explain what I do, show the range of work, and give people a clear way to start a project.

Landing page Work page Service sections CTA flow
PLAYER DEVELOPMENT APP ACTIVE BUILD

Player Development App

An app-style build for athletes and coaches to organize training goals, skill work, video resources, progress tracking, and player notes.

Training goals Skill tracking Video resources Player notes Progress tools
DASHBOARD + WORKFLOW PROCESS EXAMPLE

Program Operations Dashboard

A dashboard-style setup for organizing tasks, people, forms, schedules, updates, and behind-the-scenes program details.

Admin dashboard Task tracking Form submissions Calendar items
FORMS + WORKFLOW PROCESS EXAMPLE

Intake / Booking Flow

A clean form and follow-up flow for collecting the right information, guiding the next step, and keeping things organized.

Intake form Step-by-step flow Follow-up process Simple user path
PORTAL + TRACKER PROCESS EXAMPLE

Client Portal / Project Tracker

A simple portal-style setup for organizing project steps, client info, files, updates, forms, and progress in one easy place.

Project steps Client details File links Status updates Forms

READY TO TURN THE MESS INTO SOMETHING REAL?

Send me the idea, even if it is half explained. We'll figure out the next step from there.

START A PROJECT →
